calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: Q-007 z_beta Volatility Injection -- running_variance as explicit beta_encoder input
items.description: EXQ-051 FAIL: z_beta had no pathway from E3 running_variance, stuck at ~0.72 in stable and volatile conditions. Fix (Yu & Dayan 2005): inject running_variance as explicit scalar input to beta_encoder (LatentStackConfig.volatility_signal_dim=1). Two conditions interleaved: STABLE (fixed hazard positions) vs VOLATILE (randomised each episode). Transfer test: switch stable->volatile at ep 100, z_beta should rise within 20 eps. PASS: C1 z_beta_corr>0.05, C2 z_beta_volatile>z_beta_stable+0.02, C3 delta_z_beta>0.02 within transfer window, C4 harm_pred_corr>0.

items.title: MECH-098 Reafference Event Selectivity Pair -- ON vs OFF discriminative pair
items.description: Discriminative pair: REAFFERENCE_ON (SD-007 enabled) vs REAFFERENCE_OFF (disabled), both alpha_world=0.9, seeds 42 and 7. Primary discriminator (pre-registered): event_selectivity_delta = margin(ON) - margin(OFF) where margin = mean(||delta_z_world|| on event steps) - mean(||delta_z_world|| on loco steps). PASS: C1 delta>=0.01 (MECH-098 core claim), C2 reafference_r2>0.20, C3 margin_OFF>0, C4 min event steps>=10. Decision: retain_ree/hybridize/retire_ree_claim. Addresses EXP-0001/EVB-0001 active_conflict deadline 2026-03-25.

items.title: Q-021 Behavioral Flatness -- NoGo-only vs Competitive vs Random baseline
items.description: Three conditions: NoGo-only (benefit_eval_enabled=False), Competitive (benefit_eval_enabled=True, ARC-030 Go channel), Random baseline. Environment: CausalGridWorldV2 use_proxy_fields=True. Tests Q-021: does pure-avoidance gradient produce quiescence (resource-visit rate <= random)? PASS (C1) nogo<=random+0.02, (C2) comp>=nogo+0.05, (C3) entropy gap>=0.10, (C4) nogo resource events<=comp*0.80.

items.title: MECH-111 Novelty Signal -- E1 error EMA as exploration bonus
items.description: Two conditions: NoveltyOFF (novelty_bonus_weight=0) vs NoveltyON (weight=0.1). E1 prediction error EMA fed back as trajectory scoring bonus. PASS: (C1) entropy gap>=0.10, (C2) novel cell coverage +3 cells, (C3) harm delta<=0.02, (C4) novelty_ema>0 at eval.

items.title: MECH-112 Goal Attractor -- benefit_eval_head as prospective goal drive
items.description: Two conditions: NoGoOnly (benefit_eval_enabled=False) vs GoNoGo (enabled, benefit_weight=1.0). Supervised from benefit_exposure (body_state[11], use_proxy_fields=True). PASS: (C1) resource_visit_rate gap>=0.05, (C2) benefit_eval_r2>0.10, (C3) pre_arrival benefit score gap>0.02, (C4) harm delta<=0.03.

items.title: MECH-113 Self-Maintenance -- z_self D_eff homeostasis under perturbation
items.description: Two conditions: NoMaintenance (weight=0) vs Maintenance (weight=0.1, D_eff target=1.5). Inject Gaussian noise (sigma=2.0) into z_self at eval start. D_eff=participation ratio from epistemic-mapping. PASS: (C1) maint D_eff ratio<=1.5x, (C2) nomaint D_eff ratio>=2.0x, (C3) gap>=0.5*nomaint_post, (C4) E2 loss not degraded.

items.title: ARC-007 Path Memory Ablation (Proper) -- residue field zeroing degrades hippocampal proposals
items.notes: Fixed: zeroed_eval returns [batch] not [batch,1] to match real evaluate() signature.

items.title: SD-003 Rollout-Batched Attribution -- batched world_forward preserves selectivity (3 distractor levels)
MECH-117 Wanting/Liking Dissociation -- z_goal_latent vs benefit_eval_head post-relocation
items.description: Three conditions: nogo (no drive), liking (benefit_eval_head), wanting (z_goal_latent). 3000 steps, 8x8 grid. Resource L1 relocated to L2 at step 1500. Tests MECH-117 dissociation: wanting should maintain L1 approach >=25% of steps 1500-1700; liking should redirect to L2 within 15 steps. PASS: C1 wanting resource_rate >= nogo+0.04, C2 liking l2_redirect<=15, C3 wanting l1_fraction>=0.25, C4 wanting harm delta<=0.03.

items.title: GPU/CPU Scale Crossover Benchmark -- world_dim=[32,64,128,256]
items.description: Operational benchmark (not a scientific experiment). Sweeps world_dim=[32,64,128,256] and measures CPU vs GPU training throughput at each scale. Identifies the GPU crossover point on current hardware. Provides baseline data for comparison against Spark hardware when available. Results recorded to evidence/experiments/v3_scale_benchmark/. Not tied to a scientific claim.

items.title: MECH-116 / ARC-032 E1 Goal Conditioning -- frontal working memory goal persistence
items.description: Two conditions: wanting_noe1 (z_goal_enabled, e1_goal_conditioned=False) vs wanting_withe1 (z_goal_enabled, e1_goal_conditioned=True). 2000 steps, resource removed at step 1000. Measures goal half-life (steps until goal_prox < 30% of peak). PASS: C1 halflife_withe1>=1.5x_noe1, C2 resource_rate gap>=0.03, C3 noe1 goal decays to <50% peak by t1200, C4 withe1 goal_norm_t1200 >= noe1+0.02.

items.title: ARC-024 Asymptotic Proxy Structure Discriminative Pair -- GRADIENT vs CONTACT_ONLY
items.description: Discriminative pair for ARC-024: GRADIENT (proximity_harm_scale=0.05, harm_signal fires at approach AND contact) vs CONTACT_ONLY (proximity_harm_scale=0.0, harm_signal fires at contact only). Both use CausalGridWorldV2 use_proxy_fields=True (same obs dimensions). Reafference disabled to isolate ARC-024 from SD-007. E3.harm_eval trained on harm_signal < 0 events. Primary discriminator: delta_approach_gap = gap_approach_GRADIENT - gap_approach_CONTACT_ONLY. Pre-registered PASS: C1 gap_approach_GRADIENT>0.06, C2 gap_approach_CONTACT<0.02, C3 delta>0.04, C4 gap_contact_GRADIENT>0.04. Decision: retain_ree/hybridize/retire_ree_claim. Addresses EXP-0004/EVB-0004 mandatory_decision_checkpoint deadline 2026-03-26.

items.title: SD-005 Split vs Unified Latent -- harm calibration discriminative pair
items.description: Discriminative pair for SD-005: SPLIT (unified_latent_mode=False, z_self and z_world separate) vs UNIFIED (unified_latent_mode=True, z_world = avg(z_self_raw, z_world_raw)). Both use CausalGridWorldV2 proximity_harm_scale=0.05 (gradient fields active). Reafference and SD-010 NOT enabled (isolates SD-005). Primary discriminator: delta_approach_gap = gap_approach_SPLIT - gap_approach_UNIFIED. Pre-registered PASS: C1 delta_approach_gap>0.02, C2 gap_approach_SPLIT>0.06, C3 gap_approach_UNIFIED>0. Decision: retain_ree/hybridize/retire_ree_claim. Addresses EXP-0005/EVB-0005 mandatory_decision_checkpoint deadline 2026-03-26.
